Send notes that will self-destruct after being read.

New note ?

With Pdivnote, you can send messages that automatically self-destruct after being read.
1. Compose your note below, encrypt it, and get a unique link.
2. Share the link with the person you want to access the note.
3. The note will automatically delete once the recipient has read it.

By selecting the options button, you can add a custom password for encryption, set an expiration date, and receive a notification once the note is destroyed.

To learn more about how Pdivnote works, visit the about page. About us.

The note will self-destruct

Secret password

Destruction notification

The link to the note is ready ?

Copy the link, paste it into an email or instant message and send it to the person who should read the note.
E-mail

Private Notes uses cookies. Check it out in our Privacy Policy.
We care about your privacy
We and our partners store and/or access information on a device (such as cookies), and process personal data(such as unique identifiers and other device data) for personalized ads and content, ad and content measurement,audience insights and product development. With your consent, we and our partners may use precise geolocation data and identification through device scanning. Privacy policy

You can change your choice at any time in our privacy center.
